title: The House of the Secret (La maison des hommes vivants)
author: Farrère, Claude, 1876-1957; Livingston, Arthur, 1883-1944 [Translator]

quoteLast: the Fusilier Brigade, with “C” Company, M.G. Battalion, moved off, the 7th Battalion on the right, the 8th on the left, and the 5th in support.
title: The 42nd (East Lancashire) Division 1914-1918
author: Gibbon, Frederick P.
